recentPapers.title: Towards Faithful and Fair Image Recognition by Alignment and Calibration
recentPapers.abstract: We investigate how to build image recognition models that are both faithful and fair. We propose alignment and calibration techniques to improve model trustworthiness.

recentPapers.title: Contrastive Vision-Language Learning with Self-Supervised Augmentation
recentPapers.abstract: A novel approach to vision-language learning using contrastive objectives and self-supervised augmentation strategies.

recentPapers.title: Object Recognition from Short Convolutional 3D Nets
recentPapers.abstract: Efficient 3D convolutional networks for real-time object recognition in autonomous systems.

recentPapers.title: In-Context Learning Dynamics with Reference Points
recentPapers.abstract: Understanding how large language models learn from in-context examples and the role of reference points in prompting.

recentPapers.title: Memorization and Generalization in Language Models
recentPapers.abstract: Analyzing the trade-off between memorization and generalization in large pre-trained language models.

recentPapers.title: Compositional Finetuning for Language Models
recentPapers.abstract: A novel finetuning approach that decomposes tasks into compositional elements for improved generalization.

recentPapers.title: Diffusion Models for Combinatorial Optimization
recentPapers.abstract: Leveraging diffusion models to solve challenging combinatorial optimization problems with neural networks.

recentPapers.title: Expressive Priors for Generative Models Based on Implicit Score Matching
recentPapers.abstract: Novel methods for incorporating expressive priors into generative models using score matching techniques.

recentPapers.title: Autoregressive Diffusion Models
recentPapers.abstract: A new class of diffusion models that operates autoregressively for improved expressiveness and efficiency.

recentPapers.title: Meerkat: A Unified Data System for Exploratory Data Analysis
recentPapers.abstract: A system that bridges machine learning and interactive data exploration through seamless data abstraction.

recentPapers.title: Data Programming: Creating Large Training Sets Quickly
recentPapers.abstract: A novel paradigm for rapidly constructing large training datasets through weak supervision and noisy labels.

recentPapers.title: Accelerating Inference for Pretrained Language Models by Unified Multi-Perspective Optimization
recentPapers.abstract: Techniques for optimizing the inference speed of large language models across multiple dimensions.
